74933.subject: Objednávka OFV34023
74933.body: Dobrý deň pán/pani Oleh Novosadov Ďakujeme Vám za objednávku OFV. Rekapitulácia Vašej objednávky: Kurzy OFV: KAPITÁLOVÝ TRH - stredný stupeň (OFV) (1 rok) Meno: Oleh Novosadov Adresa trvalého bydliska: Trieda SNP 83 04011 Košice Fak. adresa: Trieda SNP 83 04011 Košice Slovenská republika Email: novosadovoleg@gmail.com Poznámka: POZOR DÔLEŽITÁ INFORMÁCIA ! Ďakujeme Vám za zaslanie objednávky kurzov OFV. Objednávka bola prijatá na spracovanie. Po spracovaní prihlášky Vám e-mailom pošleme zálohovú faktúru. Po úhrade FA Vám pošleme prístup do aplikácie na vzdelávanie. Ak ste na úhradu OFV použili platobnú bránu, prosím počkajte na ďalšie emaily. SBA EDUCA email: podpora@sbaeduca.sk web: www.sbaeduca.sk

74932.subject: 🔷 The Daily: Taiko warns users to pull funds
74932.body:
Altura winds down stablecoin vault after 'unprecedented level' of withdrawal requests | Michael Saylor's Strategy buys another 520 BTC for $35 million, adds to USD reserve despite STRC slide | Bank of England drops proposed holding caps for sterling stablecoins, sets £40 billion issuance guardrail | Ethereum 'tax' debate erupts over proposal to redirect portion of staking rewards to ecosystem funding |

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by James Hunt | Edited by Jason Shubnell

Presented by

Figure Markets ( https://figuremarkets.onelink.me/Plnq/theblocknewsletter?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Happy Monday! Analysts said ( https://www.theblock.co/post/405557/between-supportive-and-restrictive-forces-bitcoin-stalls-near-64000-as-fed-rate-hike-risk-overshadows-iran-ceasefire-relief?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) *bitcoin* is stuck near $64,000 as *Fed* rate-hike fears and continued ETF outflows eclipse the relief rally sparked by the U.S.-Iran ceasefire.

In today's newsletter, *Taiko* halts block production following an exploit, *Altura* winds down its stablecoin yield vault, *Strategy* adds to its *bitcoin* treasury and *USD reserve* despite *STRC's* slide, and more.

Meanwhile, *MoneyGram* became ( https://www.theblock.co/post/405568/moneygram-solana-validator-blockchain-payments?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) a *Solana* validator, expanding its blockchain payments strategy.

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out The Funding , a biweekly rundown of crypto VC trends. It's a great read — and just like The Daily , it's free to subscribe ( https://www.theblock.co/newsletters?select=The%20Funding&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) !

*THE BIG ONE*

*⚠️ Ethereum Layer 2 Taiko halts block production following exploit; urges users to withdraw funds*

Taiko ( https://www.theblock.co/post/405486/taiko-confirms-exploit?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

*Taiko* confirmed an exploit in its chain state verification mechanism and warned users to withdraw funds from all bridges deployed on the *Ethereum* Layer 2 network.

* The project said all bridges on Taiko should be treated as insecure and asked centralized exchanges to suspend deposits of its native token until further notice.
* Taiko halted new block production across all proposers while it investigated the incident and worked with its Security Council and ecosystem partners to contain the breach.
* The team said an attacker exploited a flaw in bridge message-proof verification, allowing forged proofs to

74930.subject: Sir Keir Starmer may be a hard act to follow
74930.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MTV9AAcAAAAAAwoerM-NSbjg7au3tRQmQfchm7EKnQZGhCO1ZYMAtmZJmaBFqEpbHdIbKMo6GOaL_-1sF0-k1sd6qJRsnZtvl6A4Ou2bsrawX2TDLCZhcw 

June 22nd 2026

 

 
 
 
The Economist Today

 Our best journalism, handpicked each day


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MTV9AAcAAAAAAwoerM-OsDZ-TY9z9J2zxnfzKDBjSdRWMN9gly3Eer3m9kWyXziYTdOzpw6B9C8JYsEZR7MNU5xxkfJv3PVVlGvHxtF8i9aFmaGO8ed1CA 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MTV9AAcAAAAAAwoerM-P7n0h3sR5gfUib7dfr_hxskQWfYoW1veQnj_mx28s5-pgw04b92bBdKyr92UCzrT5fSR3ftBp0c71pPOzw1uFdRy4NF5lqDfAsQ 



 
 

Bo Franklin

Senior digital editor



 Six weeks ago we published an article entitled “Sir Keir Starmer is on the way out”. Some of us worried the headline was premature: what if he clung on? Not a chance. This morning he resigned, and it looks increasingly like Andy Burnham will replace him without a contest. But Mr Burnham faces 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MTV9AAcAAAAAAwoerM-QnsT3OUmnaKwr3wLo452FbYb9-gdH_i22U9pPYd-qFi3RAs937joJXKuRvGAE4h2poXy8UlPOUGaHI8XR2YYMBPDwISUU 
many of the same problems  
 that Sir Keir did. 


 Each year China gives out labour medals to celebrate and motivate beleaguered workers. This year’s honour roll is heavy on technicians and Communist Party apparatchiks and light on the gig workers driving the economy. Our

74929.subject: Data & Insights: Stablecoin Sees Slide in Search Interest
74929.body:
The Data and Insights newsletter brings the highlights of the week from The Block’s Data Dashboard

( https://www.theblock.co/data/crypto-markets/spot )

Presented by:

( https://www.bitgo.com/products/trading/?utm_source=theblock&utm_medium=prime&utm_campaign=derivatives_report )

Gm data enjoyors! Summer is here! This week, we’re watching the World Cup continue to drive volume across prediction markets. Our team recently published a new report titled " Gate CrossEx: An Exchange-Native Answer to the Institutional Capital Fragmentation Problem ( https://www.theblock.co/post/404882/gate-crossex-an-exchange-native-answer-to-the-institutional-capital-fragmentation-problem )." We recommend giving it a check.

This week, we’re taking a look at what’s going on with the World Cup and search volumes. We’ll also look at Bitcoin mining revenue, tokenized equity trading, and Bitcoin price action. So grab a drink, take a seat, and let's dive in.

1: World Prediction Cup

( https://www.theblock.co/data/decentralized-finance/prediction-markets/polymarket-and-kalshi-open-interest-daily )

Chart via The Block's Data Dashboard

*Key Insights* provided by The Block Research

* Polymarket's “ Soccer ( https://www.theblock.co/data/decentralized-finance/prediction-markets/polymarket-daily-volume-per-category-sports ) ” category saw over $2 billion in volume during the first ten days of the World Cup, a 300% increase over the prior ten-day period.

* At the same time, daily average volume for the category grew from $53 million in the month before kickoff to ~$220 million during the tournament so far.
* The mechanical driver behind this growth is straightforward: the world’s most popular, most-anticipated, quadrennial tournament, having multiple daily sports matches for an entire month, where each match is a short-dated event market that resolves within 90 minutes.

* Polymarket isn’t the only prediction market that has enjoyed the fruits of the World Cup, as Kalshi's aggregated open interest ( https://www.theblock.co/data/decentralized-finance/prediction-markets/polymarket-and-kalshi-open-interest-daily ) (OI) reached a record $1.16 billion on Thursday, the first time the platform’s OI surpassed the billion mark.

* This marks a 350% YTD increase for Kalshi’s OI.
* Interestingly, Polymarket’s OI levels have remained relatively flat even during the World Cup, while the OI in Polymarket’s US arm, which is also CFTC-regulated like Kalshi, has only increased modestly, failing to even reach its April 2026 highs.

* The more interesting story to highlight, therefore, lies in the Polymarket-Kalshi OI divergence.

* Kalshi’s OI has been compounding faster than its trading volume, indicating a user base with longer hold periods on betting positions and the emergence of larger directional positioning rather than scalping.
* Kalshi's CFTC-regulated rails and direct USD on-ramp give it a structural edge for US institutional and high-net-worth doll

🧠 AI’s Crypto News Brief: Tokenization continues gaining momentum as Anchorage, Enso, MoneyGram, and OKX expand onchain financial services. Tokenized stocks are increasingly entering DeFi, though risk concerns remain unresolved. Google search-related wallet scams remain a growing security threat. Meanwhile, social trading platform Fomo raised $75M, reaching a $550M valuation. 🔑 Anchorage aims to bring banks onchain with new tokenized deposit platform The crypto bank aims to help financial institutions offer round-the-clock payments and settlement without replacing their core systems. Discover more 👛 Why Google search can be a crypto wallet risk Think your wallet is safe? A major crypto risk may start with a Google search and one wrong click. More info 🔑 Enso launches RWA app and trading for over 500 tokenized assets Enso launched access to over 500 tokenized assets and US stocks, citing a growing demand for US equity exposure among European investors. Learn more 🪙 MoneyGram joins Solana as validator amid stablecoin payment push The remittances firm has become a validator on the Solana blockchain, helping process and secure transactions as it expands its stablecoin payments strategy. Explore further 🔑 Tokenized stocks as DeFi collateral arrive before the borrowing risk is settled bStocks tied to Tesla, Nvidia, and SpaceX exposure are now in Venus' Core Pool, but launch caps keep the borrowing story unfinished. The post Tokenized stocks as DeFi collateral arrive before the borrowing risk is settled appeared first on CryptoSlate. Learn more 🤖 Social trading platform Fomo raises $75M, reaches $550M valuation The Series B round values the social trading and token discovery platform at $550 million as crypto venture funding remains active in 2026. Read the full article 📉 OKX and NYSE partner to bridge tradfi and crypto markets in joint venture led by Andrew Cuomo The goal is to enable OKX’s 120 million global users to access ICE futures and NYSE tokenized equities markets, the two U.S. companies announced. More details Stay ahead in crypto. Get vital market updates and trends delivered directly to your inbox. Subscribe now at cryptobeholder.com
Продовжити читати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-june-22-cryptobeholder-abhsf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_ne
